source: Codebase template scan + automated validation scripts
notable_findings: Payment page now configured for noindex,nofollow.
Products listing applies dynamic noindex when filtered by query parameters.
Four priority landing pages were added and included in sitemap priority rules.
Internal link checker now validates both app routes and public static assets (e.g. PDF downloads).
remaining_manual_validations: Google Rich Results Test on primary templates
Google Mobile-Friendly Test on primary templates
